case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. DONABEL MARTIN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE  LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE  LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, DONABEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2013
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-04-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
